caption: A person's hands hold a sports trading card featuring a basketball player in a red jersey. The card is part of an "OBSIDIAN" series, with the word visible at the top. As the clip progresses, the person tilts the card, causing light to reflect off its holographic, shimmering surface. In the background, a blurred scene shows a person wearing a black hooded sweatshirt sitting at a desk with various boxes and equipment. On-screen text includes a logo that reads "JASPYS" followed by "CASEBREAKS.COM" in white lettering. The background displays a mix of red and white colors, with stacks of trading card boxes visible behind the main subject. The camera remains focused on the card, capturing the shifting patterns of light as it is moved.
